research.title: GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark — Real-Time Coding at 1000 Tokens/sec (Cerebras + OpenAI)
research.whyTrending: Shipped May 2026 as research preview for ChatGPT Pro. ~15x faster than flagship GPT-5.3-Codex (1000 tok/s vs ~65). First OpenAI model running on Cerebras Wafer-Scale Engine 3. 128k context, text-only. Changes the loop from 'request → wait → review' to genuinely real-time edits. Zero practical workflow guides exist — only marketing posts.
